speaker: speaker1
text: Excuse me , could you please show me the way to the human resource department ?

speaker: speaker2
text: Yeah , but have you made an appointment ahead ?

speaker: speaker1
text: Yes , of course . I am Monica . I have made an appointment with your HR manager .

speaker: speaker2
text: Just a minute please . I ’ ll make a call to the HR office . Yes , they confirm your appointment . Please come in . it is on the 3rd floor , room 3106 . You can take the right elevator as the left on is in maintenance today .
